crime.value: Potential shooting incident - gun discharged when Irene fell unconscious, possibly hitting someone
crime.quote: I saw someone standing in front on me... the gun went off in my hands

victim.value: Unknown person possibly shot when gun discharged - identity and condition unclear
victim.quote: I saw someone standing in front on me. I don't remember anything else

culprit_and_motive.value: Unclear - appears to be accidental discharge by frightened Irene Manning, though circumstances suspicious
culprit_and_motive.quote: I must have been knocked out form a falling object and the gun went off in my hands

investigator.value: Shep Shepherd, private investigator hired by Irene Manning to help with her situation
investigator.quote: Well for starters, call me Shep... Now what can I do to help you Mrs. Manning?

red_herring.value: Accidental shooting scenario - gun goes off when Irene falls, creating ambiguity about intentional murder
red_herring.quote: Something in the shelf fell and hit me on the head and I felt I was starting to pass out as I heard the gun go off

clue_fairness.value: Open terrace door as unexplained detail - Irene notices she didn't leave it open, suggesting intruder presence
clue_fairness.quote: I noticed the curtains flowing in the breeze from the terrace door. I did not leave the terrace door open.

social_world.value: Class distinctions evident in Irene's expensive clothing and soft hands suggesting wealth/privilege vs working-class PI
social_world.quote: This was no homemaker, he though, She had class and did not seem to do any menial labor.

alibi.value: Irene's blackout/unconsciousness during shooting creates gap in her account of events
alibi.quote: I must have been knocked out form a falling object and the gun went off in my hands. I don't remember anything else

investigator_wound.value: Physical pain (toothache/hangover) paralleling emotional vulnerability, making him susceptible to attractive client
investigator_wound.quote: Deep, ever-pounding pain erupts. Somewhere deep inside, pain is revealed through flashes of sharp arcs

_meta.title: ebook jeffrey allen white a difficult autumn
